AlfrescoService
Service class for interacting with Alfresco repository nodes and content.

ApiExceptionError
 
BaseComponent
 
CastUtils

Entry

GridFsRepositoryImpl
 
HashesMismatchException
 
IsOnVaultPredicate
Predicate implementation for Spring Cloud Gateway that checks if a node is present in the vault.
IsOnVaultPredicate.Config
 
JcaCryptoServiceImpl
Implementation of the CryptoService interface using the Java Cryptography Architecture (JCA).
JcaCryptoServiceImpl.Kdf
Encapsulates the configuration for the Key Derivation Function (KDF) used in cryptographic processes.
JcaCryptoServiceImpl.Kdf.Argon2
Contains configuration settings for the Argon2 implementation of the key derivation function.
JcaCryptoServiceImpl.Kdf.Pbkdf2
Contains configuration settings for the PBKDF2 implementation of the key derivation function.
MetadataKeys
 
MongoDBConfig
 
MongoNodeRepositoryImpl
 
NodeArchivingJob
 
NodeContent
 
NodeNotOnVaultException
 
NodeWrapper
 
PathFilter
Event filter that matches repository nodes based on their path.
ProgressTrackingInputStream
 
ProgressTrackingOutputStream
 
RecentlyProcessedFilter
Event filter that prevents re-processing of the same repository node within a specified time threshold.
ResourceFileUtils
 
SecurityConfig
 
SystemSearchRequest
 
VaultApiController
 
VaultException
 
VaultService
Service responsible for archiving, restoring, and managing nodes in the vault.
